summary: Iteration 12: Tested 3 new features: (1) Clear All Data button with confirmation dialog, (2) PDF design themes selector (3 variants), (3) Editable event type names. All 3 features working. PDF generation works without errors. PDF theme persists in localStorage after reload.

ui_bugs.issue: Confirmation buttons lack data-testid attributes: 'confirm-clear-data-btn' and 'cancel-clear-data-btn' not found. Buttons present but only accessible via text ('Sí borrar todo', 'Cancelar')

When typing in the NOMBRE input, the editor card header text (e.g. 'Boda') does NOT update in real-time. The change is reflected in Reservaciones list within the same session but the editor header stays stale until re-open.
ui_bugs.selector: event type editor header h3/span near name input

ui_bugs.issue: Edited event type name (e.g. 'Boda Especial') is visible in Reservaciones TIPO column within the same session, but resets to default ('Boda') after a fresh page load. Need to verify if name is saved to localStorage or backend.

test_results.clear-all-data-btn: PASS - button visible in DB Settings section, clicking shows confirmation panel with 'Sí borrar todo' and 'Cancelar'
test_results.confirmation-dialog: PASS - panel expands inline with warning text '¿Borrar todos los datos?' and danger description
test_results.pdf-themes-section: PASS - 'DISEÑO DE PDF' section shows 3 cards: Oscuro (dark), Claro (light), Elegante (purple/gold)
test_results.pdf-theme-selection: PASS - clicking a card (e.g. Claro) visually selects it with blue checkmark
test_results.pdf-theme-localStorage: PASS - pdf_theme stored in localStorage as 'claro' after selection
test_results.pdf-theme-persistence: PASS - pdf_theme persists after page reload (localStorage value maintained)
test_results.event-type-editor-open: PASS - clicking a type card (e.g. Boda) opens inline editor with NOMBRE, COLOR, ICONO sections
test_results.event-type-name-input: PASS - input with placeholder present (found as input[placeholder='Boda'])
test_results.event-type-color-palette: PASS - color palette grid visible (3 rows of color circles)
test_results.event-type-icon-grid: PASS - icon grid visible (4 rows of icon buttons)
test_results.event-type-name-edit: PASS - can fill name input with 'Boda Especial', value updates in input
test_results.event-type-name-in-reservaciones: PASS (same session) - Reservaciones shows 'Boda Especial' after name change in same session; reverts after page reload
test_results.pdf-generation-reservaciones: PASS - PDF download button found with title='Descargar PDF', clicked without JS errors

action_items: Add data-testid='confirm-clear-data-btn' to the 'Sí borrar todo' button in the clear data confirmation
Verify event type name changes persist across page reloads (check if eventTypeConfig saved to localStorage or backend)
Consider live-updating the editor header as the user types in the NOMBRE input
critical_code_review_comments: Event type name edits appear to only persist in React state (same session) - not confirmed persisted to localStorage or backend across reloads
Missing data-testid on confirmation dialog 'Sí borrar todo' button makes automated testing harder
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features tested: (1) clear-all-data-btn works with inline confirmation; (2) PDF themes (Oscuro/Claro/Elegante) work and persist in localStorage; (3) event type editor opens with name input/color/icon sections. Main open issue: event type name changes may not persist across page reloads - verify localStorage persistence. PDF download button works (title='Descargar PDF').
